haiku:
Crunchy chips delight,
Chocolate rivers flowing sweet,
Let the smiles spill wide.
Happy #NationalJunkFoodDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Creamy dreams await,
Caramel hugs the surface,
Warm spoons dive with joy.
Happy #NationalCrMeBruleeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Lemon cake delights,
Bright stories weave through each page,
Cheers echo with joy.
#HappyBirthdayErnestHemingway from @ClamBakeSanta

Silver sliver beams,
Whispers of the night spark joy,
Stars wink in delight.
Happy #FirstQuarterMoon from @ClamBakeSanta
